description: Bill of divorce (get). All names and dates are missing. Verso: A note in Judaeo-Arabic concerning a debt of 13[...] somethings. The handwriting and format of geṭ is extremely similar to T-S 13J6.28 (14th century); the handwriting of the scribe who reused each document for accounts is also extremely similar.
description_he: גט (שטר גירושין). כל השמות והתאריכים חסרים. גב: פתק ביהודית-ערבית בנושא חוב של 13[...].
